name: seg2-anime
prompt: [LIGHTING ANCHOR] 深夜凌晨2点。室内极暗，电脑屏幕蓝白光是主光源，映在角色脸上。窗外远处有微弱城市霓虹（暖色）。无日光、无室内灯。整体色调：深蓝+黑+微暖霓虹点缀。Genshin Impact 3D anime style. The young Chinese man with black glasses and gray hoodie tentatively taps the holographic panel「确认」button. The panel expands into a glowing blue skill tree with branching nodes. His fingers hover in the air, swiping and tapping virtual elements. Blue light reflects in his glasses and eyes. He murmurs in Chinese: "这些技能...系统架构、漏洞感知、代码重构..." His expression shifts from disbelief to excitement. Window neon flickers warmly in the background. He says: "等等，这个'时间回溯'是什么？能撤销线上事故？" Normal speed, natural pacing. Chinese Mandarin.
